---
title: "My First Note"
description: "An example page showing headings, lists, math, and a callout. Copy this file to start a new note."
date: "2026-01-01"
categories: [example]
---

This is an example note. It shows the pieces you will use most often. Copy this
file, rename it, and replace the words to write your own.

## A Heading

Text is written as plain sentences, just like an email. Leave a blank line
between paragraphs.

You can make words **bold** or *italic*, and you can link to
[another page](../index.qmd) or to an [outside website](https://quarto.org).

## A List

- First point
- Second point
- Third point

## Math

Write math between dollar signs. Inline math looks like $E = mc^2$ inside a
sentence. A larger, centered formula uses two dollar signs:

$$
\int_{a}^{b} f(x)\, dx = F(b) - F(a).
$$

No extra setup is needed. Math renders automatically.

## A Note Box

::: {.callout-note}
Use a callout box like this to highlight a tip or an important remark.
:::

## Review Questions {.unnumbered}

**1. How do you start a new note on this website?**

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## Answer
Copy this file, give it a new file name inside the `notes/` folder, and change
the title and text. It appears on the Notes page automatically after rendering.
:::
